name: sim-buddy
description: sim-buddy — WorkBuddy / CodeBuddy 的本地仿真 marketplace,通过 sim CLI 驱动本机 CAE / CFD / FEA 工具。默认 Tier 1(COMSOL + OpenFOAM + LTspice)即开即用;Tier 2(MATLAB + Ansys 套件 + Abaqus + SimScale)由 sim-installer 一句话扩展。

plugins.name: sim-comsol
plugins.description: COMSOL Multiphysics agent skill — 通过 sim CLI 构建、求解、检查和审阅 COMSOL 模型。

plugins.name: sim-openfoam
plugins.description: OpenFOAM agent skill — 通过 sim CLI 驱动 OpenFOAM CFD 仿真(本地或远程 sim-server)。开源主流 CFD,免 license。

plugins.name: sim-ltspice
plugins.description: LTspice agent skill — 通过 sim CLI 驱动 LTspice 电路仿真(瞬态/AC/DC/噪声)。ADI freeware,个人使用免费。

plugins.name: sim-installer
plugins.description: sim-buddy 扩展安装助手 — 教 agent 用一句 PowerShell 装 Tier 2 solver (MATLAB / Abaqus / Fluent / HFSS / Mechanical / Simscale / Workbench)。
